backstory.original: Strongheart is a fearless seeker of justice, risking his life to ensure that good triumphs over evil. He is thoughtful, kind, and seldom rash, yet never hesitant to punish those who spit in the face of law and order.
backstory.display: 强心是勇敢无畏的正义追求者，他会冒着生命危险来保证正义总能战胜邪恶。他贴心、善良，而且极少莽撞行事，但会毫不犹豫地惩罚那些藐视法律和秩序的人。

description.original: Strongheart attacks the closest enemy with his sword, Steel, dealing one hit.
description.display: 强心用他的剑--钢针攻击距离最近的敌人并命中一次。

description.original: Strongheart commands the enemy with the most health to Yield. It is stunned and all attacks deal additional BUD damage.
description.display: 强心命令生命值最高的敌人投降。它被眩晕，而且所有攻击都会造成额外的基础杀招伤害。

longDescription.original: Strongheart moves forward and Commands the enemy with the most health to Yield, stunning it for 6 seconds. While it is stunned, all attacks against the enemy deal additional 15 seconds worth of BUD.
longDescription.display: 强心向前移动，并命令生命值最高的敌人投降，使其眩晕 6 秒。当敌人被眩晕时，所有针对它的攻击将造成额外 15 秒基础杀招伤害。

description.original: Strongheart buffs the damage of the Champions adjacent to him.
description.display: 强心对相邻勇士的伤害进行强化。

description.original: Strongheart increases the progress rewarded when completing Season Quests
description.display: 强心提高完成赛季任务时的奖励进度

description.desc: $source's base chance to Critical Hit is $amount%.
$source increases the damage of all adjacent Champions by $amount%.
$source使所有相邻勇士的伤害提高 $amount%。

tipText.original: Strongheart buffs the damage of adjacent Champions!
tipText.display: 强心会强化相邻勇士的伤害！

description.desc: Strongheart can help scavenge up to $strongheart_token_scavenger_max additional Event Tokens when killing bosses. While this cap is not reached, Strongheart has a $(amount)% chance of scavenging $(tokens_per_boss) Event Tokens each time a boss drops a loot bag. The cap increases by $(additional_tokens_per_day) every day.^^$strongheart_event_token_scavenger_description

击杀首领时，强心可以帮助收集最多 $strongheart_token_scavenger_max 枚额外的活动代币。未达上限时，强心有 $(amount)% 几率在每次首领掉落战利品袋子时收集 $(tokens_per_boss) 枚活动代币。该上限每天增加 $(additional_tokens_per_day)。^^$strongheart_event_token_scavenger_description

tipText.original: Strongheart has a chance to discover Event Tokens with each defeated boss, with a cap that increases every day.
tipText.display: 强心有几率在每个被击败的首领身上发现活动代币，上限随日期提升。

description.desc: $source heals champions affected by Justice Needs Champions for $amount health per second.
$source治疗受“正义需要勇士”影响的勇士，每秒回复 $amount 生命值。

description.pre: Whenever $source lands a critical hit, for the next 20 seconds he increases the damage of $(upgrade_name id) by $(amount___4)%, increases the healing amount of $(upgrade_name id___2) by $(amount___2)%, and reduces the base attack speed cooldown of himself and Champions affected by Justice Needs Champions by $(amount___3) seconds.
当$source造成暴击时，他会在接下来 20 秒内使$(upgrade_name id)的伤害提高 $(amount___4)%，$(upgrade_name id___2)的治疗量增加 $(amount___2)%，并且让自己和受“正义需要勇士”影响的勇士的基本攻击速度冷却缩短 $(amount___3) 秒。

description.desc: $source increases the damage bonus of $(upgrade_name id) by $(not_buffed amount)% for each good Champion in the formation, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中每有一位善良阵营勇士，$source会使$(upgrade_name id)的伤害加成提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式叠加。

specializationDescription.original: Strongheart is heartened by Good Champions in the formation.
specializationDescription.display: 强心受到阵型中善良勇士的鼓舞。

description.pre: $(source_hero) gains the affiliation(s) of the most populous affiliation(s) in the formation, and increases the damage bonus of $(upgrade_name id) by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Champion from the affiliation(s), stacking multiplicatively.
$(source_hero)加入人数最多的从属组织，并且针对每个来自从属组织的勇士使$(upgrade_name id)的伤害加成提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式叠加。

specializationDescription.original: Strongheart joins the largest bonded group in your formation.
specializationDescription.display: 强心加入阵型中连结紧密的最大队伍。

description.desc: Strongheart increases the damage bonus of Justice Needs Champions by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Event Buff or Boon that is currently unlocked, stacking multiplicatively.
每有一个当前解锁的活动增益或福利，强心均使“正义需要勇士”的伤害加成提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

specializationDescription.original: Strongheart is encouraged by a party that actively participates in important gatherings.
specializationDescription.display: 强心受到积极参与重要集会的团队鼓舞。

name.display: 活动代币回收者 QA 增益

description.original: You have my word that no harm will come to you.
description.display: 我向你保证，没有人能伤害到你。

description.original: With me! Together we can push through!
description.display: 跟着我！我们一起排除万难！

description.original: They may have bigger numbers, but we are stronger together!
description.display: 他们人数虽多，但团结使我们更强大！

description.original: The battle is almost won! Stand together!
description.display: 战斗差一点就胜利了！我们要站在一起！

description.original: I hope my years of experience benefit you.
description.display: 我希望我多年的经验可以帮到你。

description.original: Hold! We will give them no ground!
description.display: 坚持住！让他们无路可退！

description.original: Let my words sing through your hearts!
description.display: 让我的话萦绕在你们心头！

description.original: Let my steel fly like a falcon!
description.display: 我的钢针像隼鹰一样飞舞！

effects.description: Increase the effect of all Strongheart's specializations by $amount%

description.original: Heart of Gold, lead me true!
description.display: 黄金之心，带我走向真理！

effects.description: Increase the effect of all Strongheart's specializations by $amount%

description.original: Know your enemy's weakness as best you can.
description.display: 知己知彼，百战不殆。

description.original: A maintained blade is more effective on the battlefield.
description.display: 常言道，磨刀不误砍柴工，这句话同样适用于刀剑。

description.original: It will take far more than that to fell me!
description.display: 这种程度还打不倒我。

description.original: There! The enemy attacks from our flank!
description.display: 小心！敌人在攻击我们的侧翼！

description.original: Change is inevitable -- and I will change with it.
description.display: 改变是不可避免的--而我也会随机应变。

description.original: The creature was so surprised by my attack that it nearly froze in place!
description.display: 怪物被我的攻击吓了一跳，几乎僵在原地！

effects.description: Strongheart gains the Control role. When Strongheart scores a critical hit, the target is stunned for 2 seconds.

description.original: My heart now beats with the majesty of a dragon!
description.display: 我的心脏脉动着龙族的威严！

effects.description: Strongheart also counts as a Dragonborn

description.original: Steel, strike true!
description.display: 利刃啊，精准出击！

description.original: To save people - no matter the cost - is what makes someone a hero!
description.display: 不惜一切代价去拯救他人——这就是英雄！

description.original: My courage shall never waver!
description.display: 我的勇气永远不会动摇！

effects.description: Grants Strongheart immunity to stun effects

character_sheet_details.backstory: Strongheart is a fearless seeker of justice, risking his life to ensure that good triumphs over evil. He is thoughtful, kind, and seldom rash, yet never hesitant to punish those who spit in the face of law and order.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Strongheart is a Support and Healing Champion who aids and benefits from season quest completion.

event_upgrades.name: Justice Needs Champions
event_upgrades.description: Strongheart buffs the damage of the Champions adjacent to him.

event_upgrades.name: Seasoned Knight
event_upgrades.description: Strongheart increases the progress rewarded when completing Season Quests

character_sheet_details.system_description: 强心是一名支援和治疗型勇士，可以助力完成赛季任务，并从中获益。
